projectDescription: A universal build plugin that enhances the developer experience of console statements with highlighting, clickable source links, prefix/suffix customization, log passing between server and client, and a real-time console inspector.
keyFeatures: Highlight console output by file type (JS/TS/Vue/Svelte/Astro) with filename and line number
Launch Editor — click console links to jump directly to source code in your editor
Pass Logs — relay console output between server and client via WebSocket
Console Inspector — real-time UI to monitor all console statements with Nuxt Devtools and Vue Devtools integration
Prefix & Suffix — add custom text around console output (persists at build time)
Universal framework support: Vite, Webpack, Rspack, Rollup, esbuild, Farm, Nuxt, SvelteKit, Astro, Next.js, SolidStart
publicApiSurface: Options: prefix, suffix, launchEditor, highlight, passLogs, inspector, server
